# Suiviseries — LLM Context

TV series tracking PWA — Angular 22, zoneless, standalone, signals. No SSR, no @ngrx store.

## Stack
- Angular 22 (standalone, zoneless via provideZonelessChangeDetection, signals)
- Angular Material 22 + CDK (Material Design 3) — NOT Bootstrap
- TypeScript 6 (strict), RxJS 7 (HTTP + rxResource)
- Transloco 8 + MessageFormat (i18n: fr primary)
- Vitest 4 (unit, via `ng test`), Playwright 1.x (E2E)
- Service Worker (PWA + Web Push), ngx-google-analytics
- Backend: separate PHP API (suiviseries-api), TMDB data source

## Key Rules
- OnPush via the zoneless default — omit changeDetection (set ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush only if explicit)
- signal() for local state, computed() for derived — call as functions: this.value()
- inject() only — no constructor injection
- readonly on all injected dependencies and signals
- styleUrl (singular) not styleUrls; ALWAYS separate template/style files
- @if/@for/@switch — not *ngIf/*ngFor; class/style bindings — not ngClass/ngStyle
- State lives in providedIn:'root' services exposing signals (no @ngrx/signals store)
- English-only // comments (no JSDoc)
- Vitest (not Jasmine/Karma); test against translation keys, not translated strings
- No any — use unknown / proper typing
- All user-facing text via Transloco keys

## Architecture
- Services (services/*): AuthService (Google OAuth + JWT), SeriesService (REST /api/* + rxResource search),
  MetadataService, NotificationService (MatSnackBar wrapper), UserNotificationService,
  PushNotificationService, UpdateService (SwUpdate), KeepAliveService, AnalyticsRouterService
- authGuard protects /my-series; lazy loadComponent routes
- /api/* proxied to http://localhost:8888/suiviseries-api/www/ in dev
- Backend returns snake_case (TMDB-shaped); models in models/serie.model.ts mirror those fields
- Response envelopes carry { success, results } — check success first

## rxResource Pattern
Expose an rxResource factory from a SERVICE; params()=undefined skips the request.
Component consumes results()/isLoading()/error() computed signals. Auto-cancels like switchMap.

## Material Design 3
- NotificationService (wraps MatSnackBar) with translation keys — never raw MatSnackBar for user text
- MatMenu max-width 280px — use MatSidenav position="end" for wider panels
- M3 typography classes (.display-*, .headline-*, .body-*, .label-*) — never inline font-size
- Theme via mat.theme(...) in SCSS (rose primary, red tertiary)

## PWA
- ngsw-config.json service worker; UpdateService for SwUpdate prompts
- PushNotificationService for Web Push; guard 'serviceWorker' in navigator / Notification.permission

## Commands
npm start — Dev server (proxy) · npm test — Vitest · npm run lint · npm run build · npm run e2e

## Angular Official Context
- Best practices: https://angular.dev/assets/context/best-practices.md
- Full LLM context: https://angular.dev/assets/context/llms-full.txt
- Angular llms.txt index: https://angular.dev/llms.txt

## AI Tooling
Primary agent: Claude Code. Config under .claude/ (see CLAUDE.md): skills (.claude/skills/*),
subagents (.claude/agents/*), slash commands (.claude/commands/*), and a PostToolUse prettier+eslint
hook (.claude/settings.json). AGENTS.md is the full source of truth.
